creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191941
py-jtextfsm.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar file for the Python package py-jtextfsm, a smaller fork of py-textfsm, that parses semi-structured text into Python tables.

Note:
This package was originally a fork of TextFSM because TextFSM had no support
for Python3 at that time (that's not the case anymore, btw). Nevertheless this
package is somewhat smaller compared to TextFSM and is used in some projects.

QA:
~~~
poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
portlint -> OK

--
Cheers
Kai
